versions.version_description: Fixed a few incorrect chords and improved formatting.
Correct placing of chords and uses the correct A#dim chord where others just used an A7.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Heartache Tonight
by Don Henley/Glenn Frey/Bob Seger/J.D.Souther
performed by The Eagles
from "The Long Run", 1980
transcribed by Peter Eybert


[Intro]

[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Somebody's gonna hurt someone before the night is through[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Somebody's gonna come undone, there's nothing we can do.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody wants to touch somebody, if it takes all night.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Everybody wants to take a little chance, make it come out right.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]D7[/ch]         [ch]C7[/ch]                                       [ch]G[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C7[/ch]                                       [ch]A7[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D7[/ch]
Lord, I know.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
Some people like to stay out late, some folks can't hold out that long.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
But nobody wants to go home now, there's too much going on.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
This night is gonna last forever, last all, last all summer long.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Some time before the sun comes up the radio is gonna play that song.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]D7[/ch]         [ch]C7[/ch]                                       [ch]G[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C7[/ch]                                       [ch]A7[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D7[/ch]
Lord, I know.[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]G7[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, the moon's shining bright,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C7[/ch]                      [ch]C#dim7[/ch]
so turn out the light, and we'll get it right.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]

[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   x4


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Somebody's gonna hurt someone before the night is through[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Somebody's gonna come undone, there's nothing we can do.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody wants to touch somebody, if it takes all night.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Everybody wants to take a little chance, make it come out right.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]D7[/ch]         [ch]C7[/ch]                                       [ch]G[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C7[/ch]                                       [ch]A7[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D7[/ch]
Lord, I know.[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]G7[/ch]
We can beat around the bushes, we can get down to the bone,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C7[/ch]                            [ch]C#dim7[/ch]
we can leave it in a parking lot but either way[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D7[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight, I know.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D7[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
There'll be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight, I know.[/tab]

[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   x4
